mnemonics: Thamrai Selvi's Cloud Security Mantra: Trust no one, Harden everything, Authenticate always, Monitor relentlessly, Respond immediately, Assume breach, Isolate faults, Secure data everywhere, Encrypt everything, Limit access, Verify identity, Inspect traffic.
keyPoints: Principle of Least Privilege: Grant users and systems the minimum levels of access necessary.
Defense in Depth: Implement multiple layers of security controls.
Shared Responsibility Model: Understand the division of security tasks between cloud provider and customer.
commonMistakes: Misconfiguring S3 buckets or security groups, leaving them publicly accessible.
Failing to enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users.
Not properly managing and rotating access keys and credentials.
